mapper.insert:
SELECT GENERATE_PK('BM', 'SEQ_BOOKMARK')
INSERT INTO BOOKMARK ( BOOKMARK_ID, TRIP_ID, MEMBER_ID, AREA_ID, BOOKMARK_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{bookmarkId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bookmarkType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT BOOKMARK_ID as "bookmarkId", AREA_ID as "areaId", BOOKMARK_TYPE as "bookmarkType" FROM BOOKMARK WHERE TRIP_ID = #{tripId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOOKMARK WHERE BOOKMARK_ID = #{bookmarkId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM BOOKMARK WHERE TRIP_ID = #{tripId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
